checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side — Tests checklist / report photos — Add captions to all outer packing photos as per GI (TAG / SKU captions), not just on 1 photo. Every uploaded outer-packing photo must have a non-blank caption.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check photo captions on Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side
focus_terms: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side
md_sections: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side
fail_if: 47 outer packing photos uploaded but only 1 has a caption/TAG
Report does not satisfy: Add captions to all outer packing photos as per GI (TAG / SKU captions), not just on 1 photo. Every uploaded outer-packing photo must have a non-blank caption.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check photo captions on Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side

pass: Every outer packing photo has a SKU/TAG caption
fail: 47 outer packing photos uploaded but only 1 has a caption/TAG

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — Tests checklist / report photos — Measurement photos also need captions as per GI. Every uploaded measurement / product-dimensions photo must have a non-blank caption.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check photo captions on Product Dimensions Result
fail_if: Measurement photos uploaded with blank captions
Report does not satisfy: Measurement photos also need captions as per GI. Every uploaded measurement / product-dimensions photo must have a non-blank caption.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check photo captions on Product Dimensions Result

pass: Every measurement photo has a descriptive caption (e.g. size check / SKU)
fail: Measurement photos uploaded with blank captions

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — Tests checklist / report photos — Spotlight the measurement screenshot instead of leaving measurement images without spotlight. When measurement photos are present, at least one must be marked as spotlight.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check spotlight flag on Product Dimensions Result photos
fail_if: Measurement screenshot present but none marked spotlight
Report does not satisfy: Spotlight the measurement screenshot instead of leaving measurement images without spotlight. When measurement photos are present, at least one must be marked as spotlight.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check spotlight flag on Product Dimensions Result photos

pass: Measurement screenshot is spotlighted in Product Dimensions Result
fail: Measurement screenshot present but none marked spotlight
